case_title: ARCS COMMERCIAL MTG CO. L.P. A CA LIMITED PART. VS RUDOLPH, STEVEN S./RUDOLF COMMERCIAL INTERIORS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT RUDOLPH, STEVEN S./RUDOLF COMMERCIAL INTERIORS NO APPEARANCES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-31-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-15-2004 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER AGREEMENT OF PLTF & DEFT, DEFT WILL PAY THE SUM OF $2750 TO PLTF. IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS W/ THE AGREEMENT, NO APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY & CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ARCS COMMERCIAL MTG CO. L.P. A CA LIMITED PART. AS TO DEFENDANT RUDOLPH, STEVEN S./RUDOLF COMMERCIAL INTERIORS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-31-2004 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
